taxonomy: + Crataegomespilus gillotii is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Crataegus monogyna and Mespilus germanica. This hybrid plant is part of the Rosaceae family, which includes many other fruit-bearing and flowering plants. Crataegomespilus gillotii is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is native to certain regions of Europe. The classification of Crataegomespilus gillotii reflects its complex ancestry, with characteristics from both its parent species. Through its classification, this hybrid plant's unique characteristics can be understood and appreciated.
